No results found.

If you are searching for someone you have not chatted with before, be sure to enter their **full username**.

If you know they are on a different homeserver, include the homeserver domain in your search, example: **{'@'}username:{defaultUserIdHomeserver}**

toast.title: Verification Request
toast.message: Would you like to verify your other device?

deviceVerificationRequest.title: Device Verification
deviceVerificationRequest.sendingRequestInstructions:
A request to verify this device has been sent to your other devices.

Please open Discortix or another Matrix-compatible chat application on your other device and accept the request.
deviceVerificationRequest.decimalVerificationInstructions: Check that these characters match what you see on your other device.
deviceVerificationRequest.emojiVerificationInstructions: Check that these emoji appear in the same order as they do on your other device.
deviceVerificationRequest.noMatchDisclaimer:
## Your messages are not secure
One of the following may be compromised:
* Your homeserver
* The homeserver the user you're verifying is connected to
* Yours, or the other users' internet connection
* Yours, or the other users' session
deviceVerificationRequest.verificationSent: Verification sent. Please verify on your other device.
deviceVerificationRequest.requestSecrets: Retrieving information from the other device...

errors.fetchUserKeysError: An error occurred when trying to find your other devices. This could be a temporary error. Please try again later.
errors.startFailed: Failed to start the verification due to a network error. Please try again later.
errors.ignored: No devices responded to the verification request.
errors.otherDeviceCanceled: The other device canceled the verification.
errors.serverDown: Your homeserver appears to be down, or your internet connection failed. Please try again later.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.

deviceVerificationResponse.decimalVerificationInstructions: Check that these characters match what you see on your other device.
deviceVerificationResponse.emojiVerificationInstructions: Check that these emoji appear in the same order as they do on your other device.
deviceVerificationResponse.noMatchDisclaimer:
## Your messages are not secure
One of the following may be compromised:

editGroup.title: Edit Group
editGroup.groupNotFound: Group not found. Did you leave the group?
editGroup.saveErrorToast: An error occurred while attempting to update the group. Please try again later.

editGroupIcon.title: Change Icon
editGroupIcon.unrecognizedImageTypeToast: Uploaded media is not a recognized image type. Please convert it to a common format like jpeg or png.
editGroupIcon.mediaUploadErrorToast: An error occurred while attempting to upload the new avatar. Please try again later.

enterRecoveryKey.title: Enter Recovery Key
enterRecoveryKey.subtitle: Please provide your recovery key to continue.
enterRecoveryKey.recoveryKeyInvalid: Recovery Key should contain exactly 48 letters/numbers.
enterRecoveryKey.recoveryKeyNoMatch: This is the wrong recovery key, we are unable to decrypt with it.
enterRecoveryKey.recoveryKeyPartialUnlock: Some keys were unlocked, but not all. You can try uploading other recovery keys.

errors.rateLimited: You are being rate limited. Please try again shortly.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.clipboardApiNotSupported: The clipboard API is not supported. If updating to the latest version of a modern web browser doesn't fix this issue, contact the server admin.
errors.schemaValidation: Your homeserver sent an unexpected response that does not comply with the Matrix spec. Please report a bug with your homeserver.

crash.title: Well, this is awkward
crash.subtitle: Looks like we had a problem displaying this page.

cryptoKeys.encryptionNotSupported: We failed to set up encryption keys for this device. Please use an updated browser that complies to the latest web standards.
cryptoKeys.encryptionVerificationFailed: We failed to verify some of the encryption keys actually work to decrypt messages.
cryptoKeys.schemaValidation: We failed to initialize encryption keys because one of the APIs responded in an unexpected format.
cryptoKeys.httpError: A network error occurred; we cannot determine the state of the encryption keys. This could be a temporary error.
cryptoKeys.serverDown: The server is currently down. This could be a temporary error.

discoverHomeserver.title: Your homeserver is down.
discoverHomeserver.schemaValidation: We could not discover the server capabilities because the APIs responded in an unexpected format.
discoverHomeserver.httpError: The server rejected the request to discover its capabilities. This could be a temporary error.
discoverHomeserver.serverDown: The server is either currently down, or it is not a matrix chat server. This could be a temporary error.

inviteToRoom.inviteForbidden: One or more users cannot be invited, including {userId}. Reason given by the server: {reason}.
inviteToRoom.unsupportedRoomVersion: One or more users being invited to the room are residents of a homeserver which does not support the requested room version. The administrator of their homeserver will need to upgrade it in order for them to be invited.
inviteToRoom.unknown: The invite failed for an unknown reason. You can try again later.

message.pendingReaction: This reaction is still being sent. Please wait.
message.forbidden: You do not have permissions to react to this message.
message.mediaTooLarge: Your media upload "{filename}" was rejected because it is too large.
message.downloadFileFailed: We failed to download the file. This could be a temporary issue. You can try again later.
message.audioLoadFailed: Audio file failed to load. You can still try to download and play it.

profiles.missingSessionData: This session is missing required data in order to load the user profile. We recommend logging in again in order to fix this issue.

sync.schemaValidation: We could not load the page because the sync API responded in an unexpected format.
sync.httpError: The server unexpectedly returned an error response when trying to sync chats. This could be a temporary error.
sync.serverDown: The server is not responding to sync requests. This could be a temporary error.

exportRoomKeysDialog.title: Export Room Keys
exportRoomKeysDialog.subtitle: Your keys will be encrypted with a passphrase that you create. This passphrase can be anything, but **you must remember it** for when you need to import the room keys into another client.

fixDecryption.title: Fix Decryption
fixDecryption.messageNotEncryptedInEncryptedRoom:
You cannot trust that this message was actually sent from **{messageSenderDisplayname}**.

There are a few possibilities:
* **{messageSenderDisplayname}** is using a chat client that doesn't support message encryption.
* **{messageSenderDisplayname}**'s chat client bugged out and sent an unencrypted message, not understanding that the room is encrypted.
* A malicious homeserver has spoofed this message.
fixDecryption.deviceEncryptionNotSupported: Please visit this app in the most recent version of Chrome, Firefox, or Safari. This app relies on the SubtleCrypto web APIs, which your browser or webview does not support. Your best bet to fix this problem is to use a modern web browser.
fixDecryption.deviceEncryptionNotEnabledSecureContext: This app is being hosted without HTTPS security, which disables its ability to use encryption. Please contact the administrator who hosts this website and ask them to fix it.
fixDecryption.unknownError: We were unable to detect why this message can't be decrypted.
fixDecryption.roomKeyRequestInstructions: Another user's device must be online in order to receive decryption keys. We can manually request, and see if we receive them.
fixDecryption.roomKeyRequestError: We could not discover any user devices that are willing to share the room keys. It is possible they will respond to the key requests later when they come online.
fixDecryption.decryptionFailed:
It is not possible to decrypt this message.

We have the keys necessary to decrypt this message, but decryption has failed anyways. This could be a bug in the client that sent this message, or the decrypted message itself is not in a valid message format.
fixDecryption.roomKeyFound: Another user sent the key. The message should be decrypted now!

home.noOnlineFilteredFriends: No online friends found from your search.

homeserverSelectionDialog.title: Change Homeserver

identityVerification.title: Verify Your Identity
identityVerification.subtitle: In order to access encrypted messages and prove your identity to others, you need to provide your recovery key or import it from another device.
identityVerification.lostRecoveryMethods: Forgotten or lost all recovery methods?

importRoomKeysDialog.title: Import Room Keys
importRoomKeysDialog.subtitle: You can import room encryption keys that you have previously exported from another Matrix client. You will then be able to decrypt any messages that the other client could decrypt.
importRoomKeysDialog.passphrasePrompt: The export file will be protected with a passphrase that you created when you previously exported the keys.
importRoomKeysDialog.backupFileInvalid: The backup file is in an invalid format.
importRoomKeysDialog.passphraseInvalid: The passphrase did not work to unlock the backup file.

landing.title: Group Chat That Respects Your Privacy
landing.subtitle: Matrix is great for playing games and chilling with friends, or even building a worldwide community. Customize your own space to talk, play, and hang out.

leaveGroupConfirmDialog.title: Leave '{displayname}'
leaveGroupConfirmDialog.subtitle: Are you sure you want to leave **{displayname}**? You won't be able to rejoin this group unless you are re-invited.
leaveGroupConfirmDialog.duplicateChatSubtitle:
You appear to have multiple DM rooms with **{displayname}**. Do you want to leave this specific DM room for good? You won't be able to rejoin this room unless you are re-invited.

You will still be able to chat in the other DM room you are already in.

login.title: Welcome back!
login.subtitle: We're so excited to see you again!

confirm.title: Log Out
confirm.content: Are you sure you want to logout?

messagePreviewDialog.title: Message Preview
messagePreviewDialog.unableToView: Either you don't have access to view this message, or it no longer exists.

messageRequests.title: Message Requests
messageRequests.joinRoomErrorToast: An error occurred when trying to join the room. You can ignore the DM request if this issue persists.
messageRequests.rejectInviteErrorToast: An error occurred when rejecting the invite. Please try again later.

olmAccountMissingDialog.title: Device Needs Reset
olmAccountMissingDialog.description: This device previously had encryption keys which are now missing. In order to use encrypted rooms, this device profile needs to be deleted, which will log you out. You can then log back in and create a fresh session.
olmAccountMissingDialog.beforeResetWarning: Before you reset your device, take note:
olmAccountMissingDialog.identityRecoveryKeyWarning: Make sure you have access to a previously downloaded identity recovery key, or another device that you can use to verify your new session after you log in.
olmAccountMissingDialog.roomKeysBackupWarning: You may want to download backups of your room keys so you don't lose access to your previous encrypted messages.

photoViewer.downloadError: An error occurred while trying to download the image. Try again later.

encryption.identityDescription: Identity signing keys are used to verify your identity with others. If you lose these keys, you will need to re-generate them, which can result in losing access to all of your encrypted messages.
encryption.identityVerificationRequired: You have identity keys in your account, but this device cannot access them.
encryption.deviceKeysDescription: Encryption keys are generated for this device, which are used to exchange room keys.
encryption.deviceKeysNeedsIdentityVerification: You must verify your identity in order to create device keys. Please follow the instructions at the top of this page.
encryption.deviceHasKeys: Device keys have been set up. You do not need to take any action on this.
encryption.generateDeviceKeysError: An error occurred when generating your device keys. Please try again later.
encryption.unableToGenerateDeviceKeys: This application is unable to generate device keys at this time, because the library we use to generate device keys did not load.
encryption.deviceKeyNeedsReset: This device needs to be reset in order to generate new device keys.
encryption.roomKeysDescription: Room keys are used to encrypt your messages in chats. If you lose these keys, you will not be able to read old encrypted chat messages.
encryption.warnUnencryptedMessageDescription: Show a warning when an unencrypted message is sent in an encrypted chat. This could be a bad actor trying to impersonate the user sending the message.

devices.instructions:
Here are all the devices that are currently logged in with your account. You can log out of each one individually or all other devices.

If you see an entry you don't recognize, log out of that device and change your account password immediately.
devices.logOutAllHeading: Log out of all known devices
devices.logOutAllDescription: You'll have to log back in on all logged out devices.

loadError.unknown: An error occurred when retrieving the list of devices. Please try again later.

deleteDevice.deleteErrorDescription: An error occurred when trying to delete your device. Please try again later.
deleteDevice.authenticationMethodNotSupported: The server requires an authentication method which this client does not support. We cannot delete this device.
deleteDevice.authenticationDescription: Please enter your login password in order to delete this device.
deleteDevice.passwordInvalid: Password did not match. Please try again.

advanced.developerModeDescription: Developer Mode exposes context menu items helpful for debugging this application.
advanced.storageManagementDescription: Options for clearing different parts of storage for testing.

activityPrivacy.typingIndicatorsDescription: Other participants can see when you're typing in the same chat room.
activityPrivacy.readReceiptsDescription: Other participants can see when you've read their messages.
